write-canary.statement: MERGE (canary:NaclGatewayCanary {project_id: $project_id}) ON CREATE SET canary.created_at = datetime(), canary.revision = 0 WITH membership, canary, coalesce(canary.last_idempotency_key, '') = $idempotency_key AS replay FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN replay THEN [] ELSE [1] END | SET canary.last_idempotency_key = $idempotency_key, canary.revision = canary.revision + 1, canary.updated_at = datetime()) RETURN canary.project_id AS projectId, canary.revision AS revision, canary.last_idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, replay, membership.revision AS membershipRevision

write-canary-readback.statement: MATCH (canary:NaclGatewayCanary {project_id: $project_id}) RETURN canary.project_id AS projectId, canary.revision AS revision, canary.last_idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey
